items.title: Lu Dort Traded to the Hawks | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: I’m back home from Vegas. Sam and I discuss the three-way trade sending Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard to the Hawks, Zaccharie Risacher to the Mavericks, and picks to the Thunder. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky:…

items.title: Lu Dort should be expendable anyway
items.body_excerpt: The Thunder trade their longest-tenured player for second-round picks and slide under the second apron. His importance to the team was already slipping. But what's this mean for Cason Wallace? Good morning. It's July 20 and LeBron is still is a free agent. Let's basketball. The…

items.title: The Bill James Theory That Keeps Me Believing in Caitlin Clark
items.body_excerpt: WNBA culture is insane , which inspires many to fight back against its conventional wisdoms. If the crazy people in that league have it out for Caitlin Clark, it’s tempting to then assume that their criticism of Clark is all fake. Of course, it’s not so simple. In 2024, WNBA…
